failedAssertions.reason: Wrong test address 0x55282dA27a3a02eFe599f9bD85E2e0C78f9cD2b2 is an ERC-1155 NFT, not a Pickle pSLP. Also is_pickle_pslp uses ERC20.symbol which raises NonStandardERC20.

is_pool_together_v4_ticket uses raw_call with output='str' for name() which doesn't properly ABI-decode string return values, causing detection to fail for valid PT ticket 0xdd4d117723C257CEe402285D3aCF218E9A8236E1.
Wrong test address 0x16f9D564Df80376c61AC914205d3fdfb8A32f98B. Real xPREMIA is at 0x16f9d564df80376c61ac914205d3fdff7057d610.
9 test failures: wrong addresses for pSLP/xPREMIA, ABI decoding bug in PT detection, resulting price returns None.
PriceResult source string tests all fail because detection/pricing itself returns None.

appliedUpdates.description: Added note about brownie connect blocking and fireAndForget requirement for tests

issues.description: Wrong test address for xPREMIA in tests/prices/test_exotic_tokens.py. XPREMIA = '0x16f9D564Df80376c61AC914205d3fdfb8A32f98B' should be '0x16f9d564df80376c61ac914205d3fdff7057d610'
issues.suggestedFix: Update XPREMIA constant in test file to 0x16f9d564df80376c61ac914205d3fdff7057d610

issues.description: Wrong test address for Pickle pSLP in tests/prices/test_exotic_tokens.py. PSLP_ETH_USDC = '0x55282dA27a3a02eFe599f9bD85E2e0C78f9cD2b2' is an ERC-1155 NFT, not a Pickle pSLP token
issues.suggestedFix: Find a valid mainnet Pickle pSLP-ETH/USDC address and update the test constant

issues.description: is_pool_together_v4_ticket uses raw_call with output='str' for name() but raw_call doesn't properly ABI-decode dynamic string return values (ABI encoding has offset + length prefix before actual string bytes)
issues.suggestedFix: Replace raw_call(name(), output='str') with probe(address, ('name()(string)',)) or use ERC20.name property
